issues.title: Enemy damage spike on floor 6 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 33 damage in a single enemy turn when player had 61 HP (54.1% of current HP)
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for single hits

issues.title: Enemy damage spike on floor 6 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 39 damage in a single enemy turn when player had 28 HP (139.3% of current HP)
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for single hits

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-1)
issues.description: Player maintained >90 HP across 3 consecutive encounters from floor 1 enc 0 to floor 1 enc 2. HP values: [96, 92, 92]
reproductionSteps: Observe lack of challenge — player never drops below 90 HP
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid floors to create more tension

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 4-4)
issues.description: Player maintained >90 HP across 3 consecutive encounters from floor 4 enc 0 to floor 4 enc 2. HP values: [100, 92, 98]
reproductionSteps: Observe lack of challenge — player never drops below 90 HP
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid floors to create more tension

issues.title: Player defeated despite 67.1% accuracy
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 6 with 67.1% overall accuracy (296 correct, 145 wrong). High accuracy should yield better survivability.
reproductionSteps: Play through full run with high accuracy
Observe that good play still results in defeat
issues.suggestedFix: Increase healing from correct answers or reduce enemy damage scaling in later floors

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 2 encounter 0 (crystal_golem)
issues.description: Encounter took 19 turns to resolve, but the previous floor (1) averaged 8.3 turns. This is a 2.3x spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Review crystal_golem stats — HP or damage may be disproportionately high for floor 2
